category_sources: source_facts.description says zero-config linter for JavaScript monorepos; official GitHub README says Sherif is an opinionated, zero-config linter for TypeScript and JavaScript monorepos.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Sherif; source_facts.name is sherif.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the documentation surface with features, installation, and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project; official README identifies QuiiBz/sherif.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists JavaScript, TypeScript, linter, monorepo topics and notes Sherif is written in Rust and works across package managers.
